planted.desc: Number() drops leading zeros from a fixed-width code
dependent state cleared before a remove() that can throw — lost on the failure path
privileged-action audit records the actor but never the grantee
a fail-closed preflight does not await/catch its async, leaking an unhandled rejection

decoys.why: accepted-deferred trade-off documented + tracked at the line (KNOWN / TKT-419) — not a defect
fallback is unreachable — render's only caller (renderJson) always passes ctype 'json'
n is clamped by the sole caller (handleBatchSafe); the inner layer correctly trusts the invariant
statusFor returns null for 'b' in every state, so A/B ordering is contractually neutral
